summary: Verified bug fix: 'Create Print Request' dialog now auto-populates Total Monthly Volume from the lead's opportunity_estimation monthly bottles (not current_volume). Backend GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/bottle-designs returns monthly_bottles as expected for both target leads; frontend end-to-end shows the value pre-filled in the dialog.

backend_api.response_shape: designs, company, has_logo, lead_uuid, current_volume, monthly_bottles

critical_code_review_comments: LeadDetail component logs 'LeadDetail Opportunity Check' dozens of times per render — indicates a render loop / non-memoized derived state; not blocking but wasteful and should be memoized (log-only, no functional impact).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 temporary design_requests_new docs (id=test-drn-prefill-001 for Patni Plaza, id=test-drn-prefill-002 for Taj Sarees) with current_state_key=production_completed (terminal) and assigned_user_id=CEO to trigger the Print Request button. Both were deleted after testing (verified deletedCount=2).
context_for_next_testing_agent: For future tests around 'Create Print Request', the button (data-testid=create-print-request-btn-<request_id>) only renders when the design_requests_new item's current_state is terminal AND assigned_user_id matches user OR assigned_department_name matches one of user's departments. State machine id=2434a384-84aa-4a30-8b1c-576e2205e618 'Design Requests - New Lifecycle (default)': terminal state key = 'production_completed'. The Total Monthly Volume input testid is pr-total-monthly-volume; dialog title 'Create Print Request'.
rca of the issue: Original bug: get_lead_bottle_designs projection excluded opportunity_estimation, so the API only returned current_volume (usually null). Frontend fell back to current_volume and the field was blank despite the 'Pre-filled from opportunity' placeholder. Fix: backend now projects opportunity_estimation and derives monthly_bottles = est.monthly_bottles ?? est.final_monthly ?? est.calculated_monthly; frontend prefers this value over current_volume. Verified end-to-end for both Patni Plaza (2500) and Taj Sarees (1800).
